title: Server Country Flags
description: Adds a flag to servers in the server list which tells where the server is located.
body:
![Server Country Flags header](https://i.imgur.com/863Qjoc.png)

 

#

 

![About](https://i.imgur.com/g8x3Mf2.png)

 


**Server Country Flags** is a fantastic addition to your server list experience. It shows in what country a given Minecraft server is located in the server list, your approximate distance to it, and some details.

![Server list with the Server Country Flags mod installed](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/641/794/2023-04-01_19-02.png "Server list with the Server Country Flags mod installed")

#

 

![Config](https://i.imgur.com/84RSK2Z.png)

 


If you have the Cloth Config API installed, you can tweak the mod's settings in a user-friendly GUI. To access it on Forge, you press the **Config** button in the mod-list. On Fabric, you need to access it using **Mod Menu**'s config button.

![Server Country Flags config page with Cloth Config API](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/710/924/cloth_config.png "Server Country Flags config page with Cloth Config API")

#

 

![IP Geolocation](https://i.imgur.com/EAV6ri1.png)

 

This mod uses data from a publicly available, free IP Geolocation IP - [IP-API.com](https://ip-api.com/).

It limits the amount of requests the mod can make to **45 per minute**, but that's totally enough.

#

 

![Server Map](https://i.imgur.com/OOikvf5.png)

 

The mod also includes a built-in server map that provides a visual overview of your server locations, so that you can easily identify where your favorite servers are situated at a glance.

It can be accessed by the Server Map button in the server list, next to all of the buttons. You can remove or move it in the config! 

![Built-In Server Map in the Server Country Flags mod](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/641/797/2023-04-01_19-05.png "Built-In Server Map")

#

 

![Support me or the mod](https://i.imgur.com/iSODrYN.png)

 

Would you like to support me, or the mod?

Here is how you can do that:

- Donate on **[Ko-Fi](https://ko-fi.com/khajiitos)**!
- Use my [promo code *khajiitos*](https://bisecthosting.com/khajiitos) on [**BisectHosting**](https://bisecthosting.com/khajiitos) for 25% off!
- Help translate the mod on [**CrowdIn**](https://crowdin.com/project/server-country-flags)!
- Contribute code, let me know of issues or add a star on the mod's [**GitHub page**](https://github.com/Khajiitos/ServerCountryFlags)!

*Thanks a lot!*

#

 

![Dependencies](https://i.imgur.com/qYfZPVn.png)

 

Here are dependencies that enhance the mod's functionality, or this mod enhances!

- [Fabric API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api) *(required on **Fabric**)*
- [Cloth Config API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cloth-config) *(provides the in-game Config page)*
- [Mod Menu](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/modmenu) *(required to access the Config page on **Fabric**)*
- [Server Browser](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/server-browser) *(we add flags to the Server Browser to help you find the server closest to you!)*
